examples: The autonomic nervous system has two parts: the sympathetic and the parasympathetic nervous systems.
This will activate your parasympathetic nervous system which will calm you down and slow your heart rate.
Deep breathing activates the body's parasympathetic nervous system, which is essential for relaxation.
People under harmful stress lose the ability to re-engage the parasympathetic nervous system, which drives the body's day-to-day natural functions, including digestion and sleep.
